name: Chocolate Hazelnut Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Unsalted butter or margarine (room temperature)
2/3 cup Dry bread crumbs or matzo meal
recipeInstructions:
Set the rack in the middle of the oven and preheat to 350 degrees.
Grease a 10-inch round pan, 2 inches deep, and line the bottom with parchment paper.
Place chocolate in a small bowl over hot water to melt, stirring occasionally. Beat butter with 1/3 cup sugar until soft and light. Beat in melted chocolate. Beat in egg yolks one at a time. Combine hazelnuts, bread crumbs, and cinnamon and stir in. Whip egg whites until very stiff peaks form. Beat in remaining 1/3 cup sugar in slow stream; whip until firm peaks form. Stir 1/4 of the whites into the batter. Fold in the rest with a rubber spatula. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake about 45 minutes or until well risen and firm in the center. Invert cake onto a rack; let cool for a few minutes. Lift off the pan and let the cake cool completely. For advance preparation, wrap the cake in plastic and refrigerate up to 5 days or freeze up to 1 month. Bring the cake to room temperature before serving. Yield: 10 servings.
